parameters.query:
INSERT INTO s_yahoo_finance.stock_prices (symbol, price_timestamp, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume)
VALUES ('{{ $json.symbol }}', '{{ $json.price_timestamp }}', {{ $json.open_price !== null ? $json.open_price : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.high_price !== null ? $json.high_price : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.low_price !== null ? $json.low_price : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.close_price !== null ? $json.close_price : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.volume !== null ? $json.volume : 'NULL' }})
ON CONFLICT (symbol, price_timestamp)
DO UPDATE SET 
  open_price = EXCLUDED.open_price,
  high_price = EXCLUDED.high_price,
  low_price = EXCLUDED.low_price,
  close_price = EXCLUDED.close_price,
  volume = EXCLUDED.volume;
